item.title: Android Mobile Messaging Program [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Android Mobile Messaging Program [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Android Mobile Messaging Program
(Internet Apps)
Compatible to Windows operating system Android Mobile Messaging Program allows user to send bulk text messages from PC connected with android mobile phone. Highly economical and effective bulk SMS sending software helps user to compose and forward Unicode text language format messages via computer system in simplified manner. Simple and user friendly mobile SMS sending application supports Unicode language to send bulk messages in any text format in simplified way.

[read more]

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

SMS Marketing Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Company website URL www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com offers new release and cost effective SMS Marketing Software which is beneficial for all small to large scale business industries to increase their sales and build brand awareness to send multiple messages from PC via connecting android technology based cell phone device. Bulk SMS Software supports Unicode languages for sending multiple messages in few times.

item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. item.title: DataVare NSF To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: DataVare NSF To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datavare01
item.itunes:summary:
DataVare NSF To PST Converter
(Utilities)
We have several software for email conversion, but one of them the DataVare NSF To PST Converter is the best. It has various numbers of advanced features that make it unique from the other tools that availiable in the market. It exports the whole Lotus Notes .nsf file data into .pst with emails, attachments, contacts, notes, tasks, journals, etc without losing or damaging any single bit of data. It performs with all versions of Lotus Notes up to 10 and previous edits also. It comes with filter features which users can convert only selective NSF files. The user interface of this tool is too easy to understand, even nontechnical users can operate it without any expertise. Users are not required to install Outlook for the NSF Conversions. It also preserves all email properties and data structure during the process of conversion. For the satisfaction of users, we also offer a free demo to test our tool and clear yours all doubts regarding its performance. If users have any doubts they can contact our technical support team.

[read more]
item.description:
DataVare NSF To PST Converter
(Utilities)
We have several software for email conversion, but one of them the DataVare NSF To PST Converter is the best. It has various numbers of advanced features that make it unique from the other tools that availiable in the market. It exports the whole Lotus Notes .nsf file data into .pst with emails, attachments, contacts, notes, tasks, journals, etc without losing or damaging any single bit of data. It performs with all versions of Lotus Notes up to 10 and previous edits also. It comes with filter features which users can convert only selective NSF files. The user interface of this tool is too easy to understand, even nontechnical users can operate it without any expertise. Users are not required to install Outlook for the NSF Conversions. For the satisfaction of users, we also offer a free demo to test our tool and clear yours all doubts regarding its performance. If users have any doubts they can contact our technical support team.

item.title: Bulk SMS Marketing Blackberry [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Marketing Blackberry [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Marketing Blackberry
(Chat & Messenging)
Simple to download text messaging software is used to send all types of unlimited messages including business information, festival offer, and job alerts from PC to group of mobile numbers. Want to know how to send information from notebook to group of mobile numbers without internet connection? Download Bulk SMS Marketing Blackberry software from www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com to broadcasts new product launched information without using external services. Innovative Bulk sms application enables business user to send official invitation messages from computer/notebook to list of mobile numbers.

[read more]

item.title: MAC USB Drive Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MAC USB Drive Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
MAC USB Drive Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Having troubles in recuperating lost and deleted data, files, folders, photos, images etc from damaged or formatted removable storage device? Mac Pen Drive USB Recovery Software saves all recuperated data, files and folders at proper location your computer system or laptop for further usage. Macintosh OS X data revival application from www.sdcarddatarecovery.org is proficient utility that has capability to salvage entirely lost or erased files, videos, audio songs, pictures, digital photographs, snaps, crucial documents etc from damaged, corrupted or formatted removable storage device like pen drive, USB drive, thumb drive, flash drive etc.
[read more]

Macintosh OS X data revival application from www.sdcarddatarecovery.org is proficient utility that has capability to salvage entirely lost or erased files, videos, audio songs, pictures, digital photographs, snaps, crucial documents etc from damaged, corrupted or formatted removable storage device like pen drive, USB drive, thumb drive, flash drive etc.

item.title: Professional Restore Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional Restore Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Restore Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Advance Restore Deleted Files tool is fully talented to retrieve all kind of corrupted or erased file in major data failure situation including Virus attack, Formatted storage media, Files deleted from trash, Logically crashed drive, Master Directory Block, Volume Header Corruption, Bad Sector in the disk, Partition Table Corruption, Extents or Extents Overflow file corruption, Catalog File's node corruption and other data loss reasons. Restore Deleted Files tool quickly recovers your entire lost files from Mac hard drives and different kinds of removable storage devices. Restore Deleted Files program facilitates inbuilt superior disk scanning mechanism for searching and recuperating deleted files. Restore Deleted Files has preview facility to outlook lost or deleted files before actual recovery. Restore Deleted Files tool swiftly saves your all restored files at user specific safe location on your Mac OS X installed machine. Restore Deleted Files program has capability to salvage files from formatted, re-formatted, logically crashed or damaged HFS and HFS+ partitioned hard drives and other digital storage devices. Restore Deleted Files program has various skilled features and you can easily download this amazing tool from www.restoredeletedfiles.org. Restore Deleted Files software facilitates you to recuperate your ruined or missing data from hard disk, memory card, USB drive and other types of removable device. Don’t bothered if you have deleted or accidentally erased your crucial data because with the assistance of competent tool you can easily restore all kind of lost files. Features: * Restore Deleted Files Application provides preview facility to view erased file before actual recovery. * Restore Deleted Files Software supports data mending from commonly used hard disk and USB removable drives. * Restore Deleted Files Program recovers all kinds of pictures, photos, images, mp3, mp4 files from hard disk and USB drives.

[read more]

item.title: Picture Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Picture Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Picture Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Want to restore mistakenly erased, removed or damaged data, precious pictures, images etc? Picture Recovery Software is best utility to restore mistakenly lost, deleted, entirely removed or damaged data, files, important images, snapshots from various types of memory cards and can be easily downloaded from www.sdcarddatarecovery.org. Photo retrieval program has inbuilt disk scanning algorithm that facilitates to deeply search and relocate whole misplaced, corrupted or formatted data, files, pictures, valuable snapshots, digital images etc.
[read more]

item.title: SD Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SD Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
SD Card Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
File revival application retrieves missing movies from corrupted MMC cards when there is drive/system crash. Company website www.sdcarddatarecovery.org offers SD Card Data Recovery utility which is used to bring back your formatted data from SHDC cards and scans entire drive during file restoration process with advanced scanning technique.
